mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bed(room_id, bed_name, status, is_deleted) VALUES(#{roomId}, #{bedName}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE bed
room_id = #{roomId}, bed_name = #{bedName}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE bed SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE bed SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bed WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT b.*, r.room_name as roomName, bd.building_name as buildingName FROM bed b LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building bd ON r.building_id = bd.id WHERE b.is_deleted = 0

SELECT b.*, r.room_name as roomName, bd.building_name as buildingName FROM bed b LEFT JOIN room r ON b.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building bd ON r.building_id = bd.id WHERE b.room_id = #{roomId} AND b.is_deleted = 0
